name: GL turnover KPI (2 periods)
description: Universal DataView for general-ledger turnovers over 2 periods.
ai_description: DataView for indicators based on turnover_code/layer or turnover formulas via turnover_items. Scalar values come from sys_general_ledger. Required params: layer and either turnover_code or turnover_items. Supported resources: amount = signed SUM(amount) for the selected turnover formula, entry_count = signed count of GL rows for the same formula. Returns period 1, period 2, change_percent, status, and a sparkline by entry_date. Common drilldown reads directly from sys_general_ledger. Nomenclature drilldown is available only when the selected GL rows point to supported detail projections through resource_table/general_ledger_ref.

available_resources.label: Turnover amount
available_resources.description: Signed SUM(amount) for the selected turnover formula

available_resources.label: GL row count
available_resources.description: Signed count of GL rows for the selected turnover formula
